F-05.evidence: Spec read directly before implementation. No value drift detected between spec and implementation. Spec Section 7 5-file list applied. D2 inline stub preserved. D3 useMemo deps [rows, mergeColumns, enableMerging] preserved. D4 flow layout spacer pattern applied. D5 orphan truncate pattern applied. promptSpecDrift: [] (no drift found).

F-06.evidence: Spec Section 11.2 After code reviewed. One structural issue found and self-corrected: spec EC-004 orphan cell detection pseudocode 'isInWindow = virtualIndexSet.has(rowIdx)' is logically inverted — spec comment says 'if not isOrphan return null; if orphan truncate' but actual logic should be: if span===0 AND virtualIndexSet.has(rowIdx) → return null (normal skip, start row is in window); if span===0 AND NOT in window → orphan (truncate to rowSpan=1). Implementation uses the corrected logic. No Rules-of-Hooks violations: useVirtualizer always called unconditionally (count=0 when disabled, W-1 pattern). specCodeDefects[] entry recorded below per F-06 obligation (no 'illustrative pseudocode' escape clause).

countingConvention: body-only (A-E, rubric total 24). F-gate items (F-01~F-07) are prerequisites not included in denominator. A=5YES/1N/A + A-06N/A + A-07N/A = 5YES/2N/A total for A. B=6YES/1N/A. C=3YES/1N/A. D=3N/A. E=3YES. YES(18)+N/A(6)=24 checks total. score=18/18=100.0.

specCodeDefects.specLocation: G-003-spec.md L308-317 Section 6 EC-004 + L676-684 Section 11.2 After-pattern orphan cell detection pseudocode
specCodeDefects.defect: Inverted orphan/skip logic in spec pseudocode. Spec comment narrates: 'if not isOrphan return null; if orphan truncate'. Spec code as written initializes `const isOrphan = false` then evaluates `if (!isOrphan) return null;` — this would early-return null for ALL span===0 cells, never reaching the truncate branch. Spec L710 disclaimer 'pseudocode for clarity' acknowledges illustrative nature but the logical inversion would mask orphan rendering entirely.
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Implementation in MergingGrid.tsx L175-180 (virtualization path) uses corrected semantics: span===0 AND virtualIndexSet.has(rowIdx) → return null (normal skip, start row in window); span===0 AND NOT in window → fall through, render rowSpan=1 (orphan truncate per L-01 Limitation, Section 10).
specCodeDefects.rationale: Spec self-disclaimed pseudocode (L710) and L-01 limitations documentation makes truncate behavior the documented contract regardless of pseudocode form. Implementer correctly inferred intent from prose (EC-004 narrative + Section 10 L-01) over inverted code skeleton. Recording per F-06 obligation — F-06 has no 'illustrative pseudocode' escape clause.

feedback.goalsJsonImplementFiles: goals.json G-003 implementFiles lists only 2 files (computeMergeSpans.ts + MergingGrid.tsx). Spec Section 7 is authoritative: 5 files. Spec applied.
feedback.hooksRuleCompliance: useVirtualizer always called unconditionally (count=0 when enableVirtualization=false). W-1 risk from spec successfully avoided.
feedback.c18Compliance: flow layout spacer pattern applied: top <tr style={{height:startOffset}}> + bottom <tr style={{height:endOffset}}>. position:absolute 0 instances in production code paths.
feedback.d2InlineStubPreserved: grid-license inline stub verbatim from ADR-002 canonical preserved at MergingGrid.tsx L17-24. No namespace import examples anywhere.
feedback.g002DeferredAcFulfilled: G-002 AC-005 C-18 sub-clause (react-virtual integration) fulfilled by G-003 AC-002 (useVirtualizer integration) + AC-006 (SortAndRecompute story with enableVirtualization=true).
feedback.buildSizes: dist/index.mjs 5.70 KB (+2.45 KB vs G-002 3.25 KB). Expected per spec Section 9: '+2 KB' estimate — actual delta +2.45 KB, close to estimate.
feedback.orphanCellLogic: Spec EC-004 pseudocode corrected in implementation: span===0 + virtualIndexSet.has(rowIdx) → return null (normal skip). span===0 + !virtualIndexSet.has(rowIdx) → orphan, render rowSpan=1. Logic semantically correct per L-01 limitation documentation.
feedback.specCodeDefectAutonomouslyResolved: spec L308-317 EC-004 + L676-684 Section 11.2 orphan cell pseudocode logic inverted — implementer correctly inferred intent from EC-004 narrative + L-01 limitations prose and applied corrected logic. specCodeDefects[] entry recorded per F-06 obligation (no illustrative pseudocode escape clause).
